name: Asparagus Beef
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds fresh asparagus with tight tips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak lengthwise into 2-1/2-inch strips, trimming off excess fat.
2. Cross-cut the steak into 1/8-inch thick strips against the grain.
3. Combine meat with 1 teaspoon salt, 1 teaspoon cornstarch, and 2 teaspoons soy sauce in a bowl.
4. Wash asparagus thoroughly, remove tough ends, and cut into diagonal pieces about 1/4 inch thick.
5. Cut onions lengthwise, lay cut side down, and slice crosswise into 1/4-inch slices.
6. Crush garlic cloves with the flat side of a knife or cleaver.
7. Heat oil in a wide frying pan or wok over high heat until it shimmers slightly.
8. Add garlic and cook until lightly browned, then remove and discard.
9. Add meat to the pan, stirring frequently, and cook until almost browned. Remove to a bowl.
10. Add 3 tablespoons more oil, then add onions. Cook for about a minute or two, stirring constantly.
11. Make a small indentation in the onions and add bean sauce. Cook until onions become translucent.
12. Stir in asparagus with 1 teaspoon salt, 1/2 teaspoon sugar, and 2 teaspoons soy sauce. Cover and cook, lifting the lid occasionally to stir well, just until asparagus is tender-crisp.
13. Return meat to the pan, stirring briefly to reheat. Serve immediately over white rice.
